review_comment:
I think it would be worthwhile to add a new test where the signal is aborted _before_ it is passed in to `addEventListener`.
That should result in the listener being immediately removed (or never attached), but I am doubtful that is the case with this implementation.
@DavidANeil , Thanks for the review, yeah, you are right, I have added the case also handle the same signal cancel multiple event listeners case.
My testing is showing the listener _is_ removed in this case with vanilla js.
Yeah, the event listener should be removed, I have updated the implementation.
Sure, I added the `once: true` option, thanks.
